title: Qurbani Word Search
description: Find 12 words about Qurbani — the Eid al-Adha sacrifice. A fun puzzle for ages 6–12.

words.clue: The sacrifice offered during Eid al-Adha
The festival when Qurbani is done
The prophet asked to sacrifice his son
The son Ibrahim was ready to sacrifice
A larger animal shared by seven people
The largest animal allowed for Qurbani
Sharp tool used by the butcher
People who receive a third of the meat
